title: T-038 — Lot genealogy recursive CTE service
prompt:
# T-038 — Lot genealogy recursive CTE service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §11.2, §11.5, V-WH-TRACE-003/004/005.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`traceLpGenealogy({seedLpId, mode, depth})` server function executing the §11.2 forward/backward recursive CTE with depth guard.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/genealogy-trace.ts`. mode IN ('forward','backward','full'); depth 1-10 default 10; tenant_id RLS enforced. Returns rows + metadata {nodes_found, query_ms}. Depth>10 rejected per V-WH-TRACE-003. SLO <30s on 100k LPs depth=10.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/genealogy-trace.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/genealogy-trace.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a 3-level chain LP-A→LP-B→LP-C, when traceLpGenealogy(seed=A, mode='forward', depth=10) runs, then results include B and C with depth 1 and 2 respectively.
2. Given a 3-level chain, when traceLpGenealogy(seed=C, mode='backward') runs, then results include B and A.
3. Given depth=15, when called, then it returns V-WH-TRACE-003 error.
4. Given a 100k-row fixture, when measured, then query_ms < 30000 P95.

## Test strategy
- RED: genealogy-trace.test.ts covers forward/backward/depth-guard/perf.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test genealogy-trace`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass tenant_id RLS.
- Do not allow depth > 10.
- Do not exceed 30s — surface SLO alert.

pipeline_inputs.description: Recursive CTE genealogy trace with mode toggle and depth guard.
pipeline_inputs.details: Tenant RLS via app.tenant_id; depth ≤10; SLO <30s on 100k seed.
acceptance_criteria: Given a 3-level chain LP-A→LP-B→LP-C, when forward trace runs from A, then B and C are returned at depths 1 and 2
Given the same chain, when backward trace runs from C, then B and A are returned
Given depth=15, when called, then V-WH-TRACE-003 error returns
Given a 100k-row fixture, when measured, then query_ms <30000 P95
